ACI 318 · ASCE 7
Overview

A comprehensive structural design diploma covering high-rise design, seismic & wind engineering, lateral systems, and advanced analysis using ACI 318 · ASCE 7 with ETABS and SAFE as primary design tools.

Topics Covered
Course Content
ACI 318 Design
ASCE 7 Loads
High-Rise Systems
Seismic Design
Wind Analysis
Lateral Systems
ETABS Advanced
SAFE Advanced
Flat Slab Design
Transfer Slab
Shear Walls
Foundation Design
Work Samples

ETABS & SAFE Models
